title: Pawn Stars
subTitle: Rick Harrison and his family own and run a pawn shop in Las Vegas. They purchase, sell and evaluate interesting artefacts with fascinating stories.

title: Dark Marvels
subTitle: Discover the lethal beauty of booby traps as they are put into use to stop treasure hunters, body snatchers or wartime enemies.

subTitle: Look into the the many prison escapes of James Earl Ray, a notorious escape artist and assassin who killed Martin Luther King Junior.

subTitle: A competitor tries to prove the resilience of the ancient Kopis sword while facing America's historical Bowie. Later, the two finalists compete in the daunting Dead Run.
